testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_1] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_358] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order
[NONE][CKV_AWS_107] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_108] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_109] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_110] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_283] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow ALL or any AWS principal permissions to the resource
[NONE][CKV_AWS_111] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_356] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_49] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions

failure.message: Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.data.aws_rds_cluster_instance.this[0] File: \modules\data\main.tf: 113-124 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-354
113 | resource "aws_rds_cluster_instance" "this" { 114 | count = 2 115 | identifier = "${var.project}-aurora-${var.env}-${count.index}" 116 | cluster_identifier = aws_rds_cluster.this.id 117 | instance_class = "db.r6g.large" 118 | engine = aws_rds_cluster.this.engine 119 | engine_version = aws_rds_cluster.this.engine_version 120 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.this.name 121 | auto_minor_version_upgrade = true # CKV_AWS_226 122 | monitoring_interval = 5 # CKV_AWS_118 123 | performance_insights_enabled = true # CKV_AWS_353 124 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.observability.aws_cloudwatch_log_group.ecs File: \modules\observability\main.tf: 8-14 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
8 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "ecs" { 9 | for_each = toset(var.microservices) 10 | name = "/${var.project}/ecs/${each.key}" 11 | retention_in_days = var.log_retention_days 12 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 13 | 14 | }

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
